programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachel's Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel feels like her younger sister, Amy, is finally on the verge of making a major change in her attitude; in order to help Amy become a more responsible person, Rachel overrides Ross' strong protests and allows Amy to baby-sit Emma.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Ross interviews with Charlie's ex-boyfriend (Greg Kinnear) for a prized grant, the doctor makes a shocking stipulation; Chandler lies about watching Joey's bizarre audition tape.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Fall and Rise of Reggie Dinkins
programme.desc: The Dinkins family bands together for their annual push to get Reggie into the hall of fame, but Jerry Basmati stands in their way.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on projects with Leonard and Wolowitz as well as Amy on the same day; Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave and must return to work.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Halloween brings nothing but horror for Jackie after she uncovers a shocking secret when trying to reopen the Lunch Box; Mary gets upset when a woman assumes she is adopted; Darlene continues to deal with her complicated love life.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Jackie and Becky pitch their business plan to Darlene in hopes of getting the Lunch Box back, but Darlene's decision leads to hostility; Dan bans Odessa from the house, causing a rift with Harris; Mark makes extensive Thanksgiving plans.

programme.sub-title: A Pager, a Club and a Cranky Bag of Wrinkles

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: On the way to the Grey Cup, Brent considers his real feelings for Lacey.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent and Lacey try to figure out their relationship; Emma's on the warpath.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent finds out his parents never married; Lacey's mission to help Oscar.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Davis regains sense of smell; Brent realizes how little he knows about his friends.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're contestants. The driver/host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he takes them to their destination.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting members of the public climbing into an apparently normal taxicab, only to find themselves on national television, with a chance to win a small fortune; hosted by Adam Growe.
